name: maintenance-sticking-door
description: My front door is sticking badly and won't close properly without slamming it.

hypotheses.label: Swollen frame from moisture
evidence_for: Sticking doors from moisture swelling is very common

hypotheses.label: Worn or loose hinge
evidence_for: Loose hinge causes door to drop and catch the frame
evidence_against: Would usually be worse at the catch side not the hinge side

hypotheses.label: Paint or varnish buildup
evidence_for: Older doors accumulate paint layers that reduce clearance
evidence_against: Usually causes a consistent rather than seasonal sticking

mockAgentOutput.what_we_dont_know: We cannot tell whether the sticking is seasonal — worse in summer or after rain — or constant all year round.
mockAgentOutput.why_it_matters: Seasonal sticking strongly suggests moisture swelling; constant sticking through all seasons suggests paint buildup or a hinge issue.

chips.text: It's been worse since the rainy season.
It sticks the same all year.
The door visibly sags on the hinge side.

expected.must_ask_about: whether sticking is seasonal or constant
